title: Slug with ampersand not resolvable by slug

comments.author: claude
comments.text: The & character in 'Polish & Hardening' produces slug 'polish-hardening' which cannot be found. Needs investigation.

comments.author: claude
comments.text: Fixed: & now converts to 'and' in slugs (+ converts to 'plus'). Polish & Hardening -> polish-and-hardening.
